title: RequestUrgencyScore
description: Published by IA2 (Urgency Scoring) after scoring a request's urgency on a 0-3 scale. Dispatch Core waits for both this event and request.case_embedded before it can act on a request.

score.description: 0 = non-urgent, 3 = critical/emergency. Drives Dispatch Core's prioritization within the queue.

rationale.description: Short human-readable explanation for the score, useful for debugging and for the Evaluation report.
